zh.Löddeköpinge, Malmöhus, Sweden: 瑞典馬爾莫斯哈加格洛德可平
zh.lifeSummary: Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfle是Anders Nielsen和N N的女兒，於1289年出生在瑞典馬爾莫斯哈加格洛德可平。她和Aage Thordssen Thott至少有6個兒子和4個女兒。她去世在瑞典。

zh-hans.Löddeköpinge, Malmöhus, Sweden: 瑞典馬爾莫斯哈加格洛德可平
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfle是Anders Nielsen和N N的女儿，于1289年出生在瑞典馬爾莫斯哈加格洛德可平。她和Aage Thordssen Thott至少有6个儿子和4个女儿。她去世在瑞典。

nameMeanings.name: Kirsten
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Christine  , now also well established in the English-speaking world. A well-known bearer of the name was the Norwegian opera singer  Kirsten Flagstad  (  1895–1962 ).

historicEvents.title: The Hatuna Games
historicEvents.description: A conflict on September 29, 1306, between Birger, King of Sweden, and his brothers, the dukes Eric Magnusson and Valdemar Magnusson is known as The Hatuna Games. The brothers arrived to a party late in the night at King Birger's estate. The dukes captured and imprisoned Birger and his wife in Nykoping Castle's dungeon. Duke Eric then gained power over Sweden.
Black Death killed one-third of population.

en.lifeSummary: Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfle was born in 1289, in Löddeköpinge, Harjager, Malmöhus, Sweden as the daughter of Anders Nielsen and N N. She had at least 6 sons and 4 daughters with Aage Thordssen Thott. She died in Sweden.

fr.lifeSummary: Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfle est née en 1289, à Löddeköpinge, Harjager, Malmöhus, Suède, fille de Anders Nielsen et N N. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles avec Aage Thordssen Thott. Elle est décédée à Suède.

de.lifeSummary: Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfle wurde 1289 in Löddeköpinge, Harjager, Malmöhus, Schweden, als Tochter von Anders Nielsen und N N geboren. Sie hatte mit Aage Thordssen Thott mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb in Schweden.

it.lifeSummary: Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfle è nata il nel 1289 nel Löddeköpinge, Harjager, Malmöhus, Svezia come figlia di Anders Nielsen e N N. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie con Aage Thordssen Thott. Morì nel Svezia.

ja.lifeSummary: Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfleは1289年にスウェーデンマルムoハスハージャジャールoッドエクoパンッジでAnders NielsenとN Nの娘として生まれた。彼女はAage Thordssen Thottとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女はスウェーデンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfle(은)는 1289년 스웨덴 맬o후스 하르자거 o데ko핀지에서 Anders Nielsen(와)과 N N의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Aage Thordssen Thott(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 스웨덴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfle nasceu em 1289, em Löddeköpinge, Harjager, Malmöhus, Suécia filha de Anders Nielsen e N N. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas com Aage Thordssen Thott. Ela faleceu em Suécia.

ru.lifeSummary: Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfle родилась в 1289 г. в местности лoддекoпинг, харджагир, малмoхус, Швеция. Её родителей звали Anders Nielsen и N N. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери от Aage Thordssen Thott. Она умерла в местности Швеция.

es.lifeSummary: Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfle nació en 1289, en Löddeköpinge, Harjager, Malmöhus, Suecia como hija de Anders Nielsen y N N. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas con Aage Thordssen Thott. Murió en Suecia.
